bench.perf.p95_regression_pct.description: Candidate p95 latency should not regress beyond +20% vs baseline.

bench.perf.p95_regression_abs_ms.description: Candidate p95 absolute regression should stay within +50ms.

bench.reliability.error_rate_delta_pp.description: Error-rate increase should be <= +0.5 percentage points when metric exists.

bench.reliability.timeout_rate_delta_pp.description: Timeout-rate increase should be <= +0.5 percentage points when metric exists.

bench.reliability.unique_files_drop_pct.description: Unique files at k should not drop more than 10% when metric exists.

replay.overlap_ratio.description: Replay overlap should remain at or above 0.85 when replay artifact is present.

replay.reliability.error_rate_delta_pp.description: Replay error-rate increase should stay <= +0.5pp when available.

replay.reliability.timeout_rate_delta_pp.description: Replay timeout-rate increase should stay <= +0.5pp when available.

replay.perf.p95_regression_pct.description: Replay p95 regression should stay <= +20% when available.

shadow.overlap_ratio.description: Shadow overlap should remain at or above 0.85 when shadow artifact is present.

shadow.reliability.error_rate_delta_pp.description: Shadow error-rate increase should stay <= +0.5pp when available.

shadow.reliability.timeout_rate_delta_pp.description: Shadow timeout-rate increase should stay <= +0.5pp when available.

shadow.perf.p95_regression_pct.description: Shadow p95 regression should stay <= +20% when available.
